experience.title: Mechanical Engineer
responsibilities: Designed mechanical systems for manufacturing equipment
Collaborated with production teams to improve efficiency
Conducted technical analysis to optimize machinery performance
achievements: Increased production efficiency by 15% through equipment redesign
Reduced operational costs by $50,000 annually by implementing new materials

experience.title: Energy Analyst
responsibilities: Analyzed energy consumption data for commercial buildings
Assisted in the evaluation of energy efficiency measures
achievements: Contributed to a project that reduced energy costs by 5% for clients

response.summary: Enthusiastic mechanical engineer with experience in energy analysis and manufacturing, seeking to transition into energy systems engineering.
